title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Intel India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Intel India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Intel India Digital Technologies in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Intel India Digital Technologies:
Intel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India Digital Technologies!
